data.title: Bitcoin rebounds from 21-month low, rises to $60K as weak data eases rate-hike concerns. Fed's hawkish stance may be softening.
data.description: The price of BTC increased to $60,000 from its recent lows following the release of softer U.S. jobs and factory data. This news has renewed hopes among investors that the Federal Reserve's plans for a more aggressive stance on monetary policy may be softening.

data.title: HYLN Investor Notice: Johnson Fistel Investigates Hyliion Holdings Corp.
data.description: A legal firm, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, is currently looking into Hyliion Holdings Corp. (NYSE American: HYLN) as of July 1, 2026, regarding potential losses that investors may have incurred. The investigation aims to determine if these losses are eligible for recovery under federal securities laws. Investors who have been impacted by this situation are advised to take necessary steps.

data.title: Crum & Forster's Lauren Train Receives Zywave Cyber Risk Industry Person of the Year - Actuary/Modeler Award
data.description: In Morristown, New Jersey, on July 1, 2026, Crum & Forster (C&F) revealed that Lauren Train, Vice President and Actuary of Financial Lines, received the prestigious "Cyber Risk Industry Person of the Year – Actuary/Modeler" award at the 13th annual Cyber Risk Awards ceremony.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Curtis Ostler Explains Car Insurance Deductibles and Premium Tradeoffs for Utah Drivers
data.description: A recent report discusses the impact of deductible options on premiums and out-of-pocket expenses for residents of South Jordan, Utah. The article sheds light on the importance of selecting an appropriate deductible for car insurance policies. Highlighting the factors influencing decision-making for Utah drivers, it offers insights on finding the optimal balance between deductible amount, premium rates, and out-of-pocket costs. Residents in South Jordan can make informed choices about their car insurance policies by considering these guidelines.

data.title: Digitalage, a Hop-on (OTCID: HPNN) Subsidiary, Secures Apple App Store Approval as Patent-Pending Creator Platform Enters Soft Launch
data.description: Digitalage, a subsidiary of Hop-on, has successfully obtained approval from the Apple App Store. This significant milestone comes after finalizing its patent-pending infrastructure and creator revenue-sharing model. This accomplishment signals a strategic move for Digitalage, as it positions itself for growth in the competitive app market.

data.title: New nonprofit, endorsed by Joe Lubin, BitMine, and SharpLink, to spearhead institutional adoption of Ethereum amid rising competition for capital.
data.description: Supported by notable figures such as Joe Lubin, BitMine, and SharpLink, a new independent organization has been established. It will act as a bridge for financial institutions interested in considering Ethereum as a viable option in the increasingly competitive market for institutional capital.

data.title: WallachBeth Capital Announces Closing of Tenon Medical, Inc. $4.2 Million Public Offering
data.description: On July 1, 2026, WallachBeth Capital LLC, a prominent firm offering capital markets and institutional execution services, revealed that Tenon Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: TNON), a healthcare equipment company focused on revolutionizing medical care, has made significant strides. WallachBeth Capital LLC plays a crucial role in supporting Tenon's operations and growth in the financial sector.
AOL OWNER BENDING SPOONS CLIMBS 6.9% AFTER $1.68 BILLION US IPO

data.title: Stellantis Reports US Sales Gains in First-half 2026
data.description: In Auburn Hills, Michigan, as of July 1, 2026, total sales for June have surged by 10% compared to the previous year. Over the second quarter, there has been a notable 6% increase in total sales year over year. The first half of 2026 has seen a significant growth of 5% in total sales in comparison to the first half of 2025. The company's efforts in executing its strategies have been driving these continuous increases in total sales, indicating a building momentum in its sales performance.

data.title: Altea Partners Appoints Ahmad AlFarabi as Partner & Chief Growth Officer
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Altea Partners, a privately owned merchant banking firm based in London and Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, revealed the selection of Ahmad AlFarabi as the new Partner & Chief. Specializing in managing capital flows between Europe, the Middle East, and North America, Altea Partners continues to expand its reach with this strategic appointment.

data.title: Securitize President advocates DeFi to disrupt stock lending, believes tokenization will empower retail investors.
data.description: Brett Redfearn, President of Securitize, believes that tokenization will extend the key advantage of disintermediation offered by crypto to retail investors.

data.title: Oasys LS-DYNA Environment Uses Tech Soft 3D's HOOPS Exchange to Expand CAD Import Support in Oasys PRIMER 23
data.description: A partnership between Tech Soft 3D and Oasys LS-DYNA Environment resulted in the integration of Tech Soft 3D’s HOOPS Exchange into Oasys PRIMER 23 to enhance CAD import support from 3 to 16 formats. Tech Soft 3D, a key provider of engineering software development toolkits, focuses on CAD and CAE data conversion, visualization, and simulation tools. The collaboration aims to assist engineering teams in importing CAD geometry from various design systems while preparing models for simulation. This integration signifies a significant development in expanding the capabilities of Oasys PRIMER 23, offering more versatility and efficiency to users.

data.title: Mr John Wrottesley Appointed as New General Manager of International Cable Protection Committee (ICPC)
data.description: The International Cable Protection Committee (ICPC) in Portsmouth, United Kingdom, has appointed Mr. John Wrottesley as its new General Manager. This announcement marks a significant development for the organization, which is responsible for safeguarding underwater cables worldwide. With this appointment, Mr. Wrottesley will lead the ICPC in its mission to protect vital communication infrastructure.

data.title: CrowdStrike Named Frost & Sullivan’s 2026 Global Enabling Technology Leader in Zero Trust Browser Security
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) was revealed today by Frost & Sullivan as the 2026 Global Enabling Technology Leader in Zero Trust Browser Security. The browser now serves as the primary workspace for contemporary work, allowing employees to connect with email, SaaS applications, collaboration tools, customer data, and AI services. With the browser handling all these functions, it has become a prime target for cyber attackers since it stands at the intersection of users, identities, applications, and vital enterprise data.
Details of weekly share buyback program transactions revealed, impacting company's stock price.

data.title: Real Estate Expert Phil Frye of Newark Explores Move-In Ready Homes for HelloNation
data.description: In Newark, Ohio on July 1, 2026, a recent HelloNation article titled "Are Move-In Ready Homes Truly Ready to Live In?" delves into the true definition of "move-in ready" homes when searching for a new residence. The article features commentary from Real Estate Expert Phil Frye from Century 21 Phil Frye Real Estate. This report scrutinizes the actual condition of homes labeled as "move-in ready" to determine if they truly meet the expectations of prospective buyers. The insights provided shed light on common misconceptions and considerations individuals should keep in mind while navigating the real estate market.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- United Way of Greater Newark/
data.description: United Ways of New Jersey, along with New Jersey Policy Perspective and New Jersey Cash Alliance, have praised the Governor for expanding the Child Tax Credit. The news was released on June 30, 2026, by United Way of Greater Newark. This announcement acknowledges the positive impact of the expansion on families in New Jersey. The changes are aimed at benefiting a significant number of children across the state by providing additional financial support. The organizations involved in the commendation highlight the importance of such initiatives in helping families thrive and promoting child well-being.

data.title: Rooter Hero Announces Fourth of July Plumbing Specials and 24/7 Service Availability Throughout Holiday Weekend
data.description: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air revealed its exclusive Fourth of July deals today, confirming round-the-clock emergency service at all branches during the holiday weekend. The company also introduced two additional plumbing offers for customers to enjoy.
Bank of America Corporation releases transparency declaration on Umicore - intriguing read!

data.title: Meritus Gas Partners Expands Denver Presence with Acquisition of HICO Distributing of Colorado
data.description: Today, Meritus Gas Partners revealed that its subsidiary, Buckeye Welding Supply, has completed the acquisition of HICO Distributing of Colorado, starting on July 1, 2026. This acquisition involves the takeover of HICO's assets, a move that marks a significant development in the industry. HICO, founded by Wyatt and Vanessa in 1993, has been operating successfully for over three decades, showing the potential benefits of this acquisition.
